problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
